2603.19416.title: Investigating In-Context Privacy Learning by Integrating User-Facing Privacy Tools into Conversational Agents
2603.19416.paper_summary: Supporting users in protecting sensitive information when using conversational agents (CAs) is crucial, as users may undervalue privacy protection due to outdated, partial, or inaccurate knowledge about privacy in CAs. Although privacy knowledge can be developed through standalone resources, it may not readily translate into practice and may remain detached from real-time contexts of use. In this study, we investigate in-context, experiential learning by examining how interactions with privacy tools during chatbot use enhance users' privacy learning. We also explore interface design features that facilitate engagement with these tools and learning about privacy by simulating ChatGPT's interface which we integrated with a just-in-time privacy notice panel. The panel intercepts messages containing sensitive information, warns users about potential sensitivity, offers protective actions, and provides FAQs about privacy in CAs. Participants used versions of the chatbot with and without the privacy panel across two task sessions designed to approximate realistic chatbot use. We qualitatively analyzed participants' pre- and post-test survey responses and think-aloud transcripts and describe findings related to (a) participants' perceptions of privacy before and after the task sessions and (b) interface design features that supported or hindered user-led protection of sensitive information. Finally, we discuss future directions for designing user-facing privacy tools in CAs that promote privacy learning and user engagement in protecting privacy in CAs.
2603.19416.paper_summary_zh: 支持用戶在使用對話代理（CAs）時保護敏感信息至關重要，因為用戶可能因對 CAs 隱私的過時、片面或不準確的認識而低估隱私保護的重要性。雖然隱私知識可以通過獨立資源來發展，但這些知識可能不會輕易轉化為實踐，並且可能與實時使用情境脫節。在本研究中，我們通過檢視在使用聊天機器人過程中與隱私工具的互動如何增強用戶的隱私學習，來研究情境中的經驗學習。我們還探索了促進用戶參與這些工具和學習隱私的介面設計特徵，通過模擬 ChatGPT 的介面，並與即時隱私通知面板集成。該面板攔截包含敏感信息的消息，警告用戶潛在的敏感性，提供保護措施，並提供有關 CAs 隱私的常見問題解答。參與者在兩個任務會議中使用了帶有和不帶有隱私面板的聊天機器人版本，這些會議旨在近似現實的聊天機器人使用情境。我們對參與者的前後測調查回應和思考過程的逐字稿進行了質性分析，並描述了與（a）參與者在任務會議前後對隱私的看法以及（b）支持或阻礙用戶主導保護敏感信息的介面設計特徵相關的發現。最後，我們討論了未來在 CAs 中設計面向用戶的隱私工具的方向，以促進隱私學習和用戶在保護 CAs 隱私方面的參與。
2603.19416.author: Mohammad Hadi Nezhad et.al.
2603.19416.authors: Mohammad Hadi Nezhad, Francisco Enrique Vicente Castro, Ivon Arroyo
